items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez

llmResponse.agenda_changes: Item 13.1 (recognition of classified employees) was moved from later in the agenda to immediately after the changes to agenda section and before oral communication. Additionally, items 6.1 (bond program consent items), 6.2, and 6.3 were moved from consent to action items due to public comments received.
